Name: GFG Alliance
Description:
GFG Alliance is a collection of global businesses and investments owned by Sanjeev Gupta and his family. The Alliance is structured into three core industrial pillars; LIBERTY Steel Group, ALVANCE Aluminium Group and SIMEC Energy Group, independent of each other yet united through shared values and a purpose to create a sustainable future for industry and society.       

Our strategy is to create an economically sustainable business model for our industries which is profitable for the long term, allows for socially sustainable development in our local communities and is carbon neutral.  

Our strategy is driven by four key trends – increasing demand for steel and aluminium, the urgent need to decarbonise these sectors, the decline of traditional manufacturing industries in developed economies and the need to be globally competitive in a changing world. Our strategy enables us to identify opportunity and drive positive change in our industries. 

This means modernising industrial sites that have been left behind, establishing partnerships with employees to create self-determined change and transforming manufacturing processes by harnessing renewable power and agile production. This leads to lower costs, reduced emissions and sustainable profits to secure long-term employment in the communities we operate in.

Name: Aurubis
Description:
Aurubis AG is a leading global provider of non-ferrous metals and one of the largest copper recyclers worldwide. The company processes complex metal concentrates, scrap metals, organic and inorganic metal-bearing recycling materials, and industrial residues into metals of the highest quality. Aurubis produces more than 1 million tons of copper cathodes annually, and from them a variety of products such as wire rod, continuous cast shapes, profiles, and flat rolled products made of copper and copper alloys. Aurubis produces a number of other metals as well, including precious metals, selenium, lead, nickel, tin, and zinc. The portfolio also includes additional products such as sulfuric acid and iron silicate. 

Sustainability is a fundamental part of the Aurubis strategy. “Aurubis responsibly transforms raw materials into value” – following this maxim, the company integrates sustainable conduct and business activities into the corporate culture. This involves a careful approach to natural resources, responsible social and ecological conduct in everyday business, and sensible, healthy growth. 

Aurubis has about 7,100 employees, production sites in Europe and the US, and an extensive worldwide distribution system.

Aurubis shares are part of the Prime Standard Segment of the German Stock Exchange and are listed in the MDAX, the Global Challenges Index (GCX), and the STOXX Europe 600.

Name: Khoemacau Copper Mining
Description:
At a glance
Zone 5 Operations [photo]
Zone 5 Operations
The Khoemacau flagship +60ktpa copper and +2Mozpa silver metal in concentrate Project has involved the development of the Zone 5 underground mine and associated infrastructure, and the upgrade and expansion of the existing Boseto processing plant. The Phase 2 Expansion will see production rise to +130ktpa copper and +5Mozpa silver metal in concentrate.
The Zone 5 deposit currently has a 22-year mine life, with a total mineral resource of 92Mt at 2.2% Cu and 22g/t Ag. This high grade deposit offers a 4.2km strike length and with average widths over 10m is ideally suited to modern, highly mechanised mining, delivering C1 cash costs over the life estimated at approximately $1.30 per pound* of copper and $1.80* per pound on an all-in sustaining basis.

The Project was fully funded, through the US$650 million facilities raised in 2019. The total Project development capital costs were approximately $412m (within 3% of the original budget), and commissioning of the process plant was completed in July 2021. Ramp of mining is underway and due to reach full capacity in Q4 2022.The process plant and infrastructure has demonstrated operations at full capacity and design specifications.

Resource development drilling and feasibility studies of the Phase 2 Expansion exploiting the Zone 5 N, Zeta NE and Mango NE deposits, which offer total mineral resources of 76Mt at 2% Cu and 34g/t Ag, are underway, while regional exploration continues to define additional exploration targets.

Steady state production from the Current Operations will be +60ktpa copper and +2Mozpa silver metal in concentrate, growing to +130ktpa and +5Mozpa respectively as part of the Phase 2 Expansion with the ability to extend production to +150ktpa and +6Moz respectively.

* net of silver credits at consensus pricing

Name: SOLVOMET R&T Centre
Description:
SOLVOMET is KU Leuven's Research & Training Centre that develops new and/or optimises existing hydrometallurgical unit processes and (circular) flowsheets. We have a strong focus on continuous, countercurrent solvent extraction processes for metal and acid recovery.

We offer companies worldwide both short-term contract research projects (3-12 months) and long-term, framework agreements (multiple years). We validate unit processes up to TRL5 (mini-pilot scale). We provide tailored training to industry.

Energy-transition metals
SOLVOMET focuses on novel metal extraction and purification processes for the so-called “energy-transition metals’. These are metals such as lithium, cobalt and rare-earth elements, which are all instrumental in driving the transition to a climate-neutral society.

The SOLVOMET approach
SOLVOMET goes beyond a basic, trial-and-error methodology to develop or optimise hydrometallurgical flowsheets. Instead, SOLVOMET combines experimental testing on lab/mini-pilot scale with detailed feed characterisation, thermodynamic and kinetic modelling, and a deep, molecular understanding of metal extraction mechanisms. 

Circular hydrometallurgy?
SOLVOMET recently postulated the “Twelve Principles of Circular Hydrometallurgy” (Binnemans & Jones, Journal of Sustainable Metallurgy 9(1) (2023) 1-25)). Circular hydrometallurgy refers to the area of hydrometallurgy that focuses on the design of energy-efficient flowsheets or unit processes that consume a minimal amount of reagents and produce virtually no waste. It entails a different way of thinking about how hydrometallurgy is practiced, both for primary mining and recycling processes. Circularity refers to the regeneration and reuse of all the reagents in a process. SOLVOMET uses these 12 principles to design metallurgical unit processes and integrated flowsheets, in close collaboration with its industrial partners.

SOLVOMET is part of Belgium's leading university, i.e. KU Leuven.

Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana temel prensibimiz; müşterinin ihtiyacını doğru analiz etmek, doğru ürünü doğru koşullarda sunmak olmuştur.
Hisarinoks olarak yalnızca ürün temin eden bir firma değil; satın alma sürecini kolaylaştıran, zaman ve maliyet avantajı sağlayan güvenilir bir iş ortağı olmayı hedefliyoruz.

Faaliyet Alanlarımız;
Geniş ürün yelpazemiz sayesinde farklı sektörlerin paslanmaz çelik ihtiyaçlarına tek noktadan çözüm sunuyoruz:
•	Paslanmaz sac ürün grupları
•	Paslanmaz boru ve profil çeşitleri
•	Paslanmaz dolu malzemeler
•	Paslanmaz fittings ve bağlantı elemanları

Ne Sağlıyoruz?
Hisarinoks ile çalışan firmalar;

•	Aradığı ürünü farklı tedarikçilerde zaman kaybetmeden, tek noktadan temin eder
•	Stok ve teslimat belirsizliği yaşamaz
•	Teknik uyumsuzluk ve yanlış ürün riskini minimize eder
•	Satın alma süreçlerinde hız kazanır

Tüm ürün gruplarımız, sektör standartlarına uygun kalite kriterlerinde, güvenilir tedarik kanallarından sağlanmaktadır.

Name: Farmers of Gold ASGM
Description:
THE PROJECT
PRIMARY MISSION STATEMENT:
Creating a self-sustaining duplicate Mercury Free Gold Extraction System and Safety Education and Training for the A.S.G.M.(Artisanal Small Scale Gold Mining) Community.



We have been working full time in Kenya since  2018 under Farmers of Gold,  and have made tremendous progress in implementing our efforts.  

 

We currently have a Shaker-Table, Jaw Crusher,  3-phase diesel generators, smelter, mercury retorts, modern sluices,   in helping the miners on mercury free processing of gold. 
Other projects include, but are not limited to..
 1. Currently we have working partnership between our Farmers
of Gold, the UNDP, Solidaridad, Chambers Federation, Impact Facility, and the Kenyan Ministry of Mining.

 

2. Creating safety training video courses with several videos including safety gear, safety techniques, safety hazards in artisanal gold mining practices,
the use of mercury, silica from dust, hearing protection, and safe mine construction. 

3. Create a short and comprehensive safety quiz pertaining to the training videos. Issue a certificate of completion upon passing the safety quiz. This certificate would also allow subsidised purchases of safety gear that will be made available thru the various mining committees 


4. Franchise our partner safety equipment store MaraTec which currently purchases and rental of safety gear matching quality approved
by the Kenyan Government work place safety standards.

 
5. Formalise all artisanal gold miners into  legal cooperatives requiring miners to be stringent in the use of safety gear and use of toxic materials.

 
6. Provide a registration mechanism  in order to further formalise artisanal mining to a legal and regulated sector.

 
7. Removing mercury all together from the process, including cleanup of the environment.

Thank you for all your support!

Get a hold of Matt for more information. +17867082214  or +254797968766

Name: Liberate Minerals
Description:
Liberate Minerals Limited is commercialising a globally unique, Australian-developed refining technology built for the critical minerals and rare earths era. Our mission is to deliver sovereign, scalable and sustainable refining capability to Australia and its strategic partners.

At the core of our platform is the Resource Maximisation Process (RMP) — a 21st-century fluorine-based chemical refining technology that enables cost-effective, multi-commodity pathways for lithium, rare earths, graphite, high-purity silica, alumina and other strategic materials essential to clean energy, advanced manufacturing and defence. RMP is wholly Australian intellectual property, protected by multiple patent applications, and is redefining the next generation of mid-stream refining.

Our goal is to democratise critical mineral and rare earth refining, removing bottlenecks created by concentrated global processing and restoring industrial independence to Australia — a key pillar of a Future Made in Australia.

Liberate Minerals is Australia’s next-generation mid-stream refining company, built to turn critical minerals into critical value. We bridge the gap between mining and manufacturing with modular, low-energy, zero-waste solutions that maximise value recovery from every tonne of ore, concentrate, fines and tailings.

What We Deliver:
• Sustainable mid-stream processing for net-zero supply chains
• Modular refining hubs deployable across Australia and allied markets
• High-purity products for batteries, magnets, alloys, semiconductors and advanced manufacturing
• Maximum value extraction from existing and new resource streams
• A sovereign pathway that keeps more value and capability in Australia

Liberate Minerals combines breakthrough chemistry with commercial execution to build a cleaner, more secure and more resilient industrial future.

Name: New Dawn Metals
Description:
New Dawn Metals (NDM), a company incorporated in England in January 2019, has signed a Technical Partnership Agreement with Base Metals Guinee SARLU, a Guinean company, that has exploration licences in the Mamou and Faranah prefectures in the Republic of Guinea. These licences are referred to as the Marela Project. 

The Technical Partnership Agreement was approved by the Minister of Mines in March 2019. Under the terms of the Technical Partnership Agreement the mining licence will be granted to NDM’s Guinean subsidiary company at the “decision to mine” stage and NDM will then hold an 85% interest, with the Government of Guinea holding 15%. NDM has strong local support for project development and will work closely with the Government for the benefit of all stakeholders.

NDM’s primary focus is to develop Guinea’s first nickel-cobalt-scandium mine on the Marela project to produce nickel-cobalt products and a scandium-oxide product. NDM’s secondary objective is to produce and sell a mixed ilmenite and magnetite concentrate to off-takers for the production of vanadium pentoxide and synthetic rutile.

NDM is currently doing a FEL-1 Scoping Study using Hatch which is expected to be completed by the end of Q1 2024. NDM plans to list through an IPO in H2 2024. 

NDM is a Member of the UK’s Critical Minerals Association.

By focusing on this area, OSI positions itself as a player that can offer added value through more efficient processes.

Geographical Focus: Africa

The company's primary geographical focus is on African-sourced minerals. This indicates a strategic commitment to a continent rich in mineral resources but often facing challenges related to efficient extraction and sustainability.

 * Access to Rich Deposits: Africa holds significant reserves of many important minerals, providing OSI with access to potentially large volumes of raw materials.

 * Opportunities for Value Creation: By applying innovative methods in a region where such practices may not be as widespread, OSI can create significant value by improving existing processes.

 * Contribution to Local Development: If the company implements sustainable methods, it can contribute positively to the local economy and society in the African countries where it operates.

Innovation and Sustainability

OSI emphasizes the use of innovative and sustainable practices to enhance the value chain. This is a central part of the company's business model and signals:

 * Long-term Viability: A focus on sustainability is crucial for long-term profitable mining operations, as it reduces environmental risks and social conflicts. It can also open doors to financing from investors with a sustainability profile.

 * Competitive Advantage: Innovative methods can lead to more efficient processes, lower costs, and/or higher quality end products, providing a competitive edge in the market.

Name: Renocell Recycling Private Limited
Description:
In the heart of Kolkata, Renocell Recycling Private Limited, a startup founded in 2023, is revolutionizing battery waste management. This visionary company is committed to reshaping India's approach to lithium-ion battery recycling and reuse with a strong focus on environmental preservation, resource conservation, and social responsibility.

The Battery Challenge in India

India's rapid growth in sectors like electric vehicles (EVs) and renewable energy has led to a surge in lithium-ion battery usage. However, the disposal of these batteries at the end of their life cycle poses environmental and safety risks. In response, India introduced the Battery Waste Management Rules in 2022, emphasising Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR).

The Birth of Renocell Recycling

Renocell Recycling was born from a vision of sustainability. Its founders sought to address India's battery waste problem by promoting efficient battery use and recycling. This mission aligns with India's broader goals of sustainable development and environmental protection.

Renocell's Comprehensive Approach

Renocell Recycling offers end-to-end battery waste management solutions. Advanced sorting and processing methods ensure efficient recovery of valuable materials from used batteries, minimising environmental impact and maximising resource recovery.

Embracing Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR)

Renocell Recycling fully embraces EPR, collaborating with battery manufacturers to ensure responsible battery management throughout their life cycle. This approach fosters a circular and eco-conscious battery industry.

Shaping India's Sustainable Future

Renocell Recycling Private Limited, as a startup with a vision, is set to make a significant impact on India's battery waste management. With its commitment to environmental protection, resource conservation, and innovation, Renocell Recycling is driving positive change towards a cleaner, more sustainable, and economically vibrant future.

Name: Depodart
Description:
Depodart is an artificial intelligence mineral exploration company making significant technical advances. By leveraging extensive databases and incorporating a wide range of geological, geochemical, geophysical, and satellite variables, our machine learning models can detect subtle interaction patterns among them. This capability is used to generate high-precision multivariate maps, where new deposits are identified within the context of the mineral system that formed them.

 What We Offer
We specialize in:

AI-powered mineral detection and analysis
High-resolution prospectivity maps
Custom consulting for exploration planning
Exclusive mineral rights sales for verified areas
 Our Solution
Our proprietary system integrates geological, geochemical, and geophysical datasets, even when data is sparse or unevenly distributed. Using robust algorithms, we generate 2D maps showing mineral concentration zones with precise geographic coordinates—down to 50 m² resolution.

The system is flexible, adaptable to a variety of minerals (such as gold and silver), and built to deliver reliable, actionable insights for mineral exploration.

 How It Works
Our value delivery process follows a clear six-step model:

Client engagement – Direct outreach or inbound requests
Data collection – Gathering relevant geological data
Data processing – Preparing and structuring input for ML analysis
Algorithmic analysis – Running proprietary models
Results generation – Delivering actionable prospectivity maps
Expert consultation – Tailored insights and support

Name: The Norwegian X-ray Conference
Description:
XRD and XRF spectrometry are chemical analysis techniques with a wide use in industry and scientific research. Particularly developments of smaller size instruments such as bench top and handheld (HH) instruments have increased the use of this techniques within recycling, environmental analysis and art and archaeology. The green shift including circular economy principles along with an increased digital transformation also provides new exciting opportunities.
The aim of the Norwegian X-ray conference is to bring together industrial and academic experts and users of XRD and XRF in Scandinavia with manufacturers and suppliers of analysis instruments, preparation equipment, reference materials and other chemicals. We have a special focus on new technology and markets, specifically on handheld (HH), benchtop and on-line ED-XRF applications. We are part of the Norwegian Chemical Society. The objective of the society to prommote the interest and understanding of chemistry and and chemical technology with respect to teaching and researc. The Norwegian X-Ray Conference was first put together as a seminar in 1980 by the founder Åge Storm. 

For suppliers this conference is an excellent opportunity to showcase and introduce your products and services, and users will be able to exchange their experiences with producers and suppliers and learn about new developments in the field.
Users, researchers and suppliers are welcome to submit oral or poster presentations in related topics as mentioned above. We always have a minimum of three invited speakers for in-depth lectures on XRF and XRD topics.

The conference normally takes place biannually Monday to Wednesday early September in even years. We start the program after lunch the first day, and end the conference with lunch Wednesday. In 2022 we have started offering a short in-depth course in a hot topic Monday morning.

Name: Núcleo Indústria e Comércio de Ferroligas
Description:

Em dezembro de 2018 a Núcleo Ligas se instalou em uma nova sede, com área total de 4 mil metros, modernizando todo o seu setor produtivo e incorporando a produção de ferroligas através de processos aluminotérmicos. Está localizada na área industrial de Cumbica, Guarulhos, um dos mais importantes e bem localizados polos industriais de São Paulo.

Possui produção própria dos seguintes produtos: Ferro Molibdênio, Ferro Tungstênio, Ferro Titânio, Ferro Silício Zircônio, Ferro Vanádio, Ferro Nióbio, Ferro Manganês Médio Carbono e Ferro Manganês Baixo Carbono, seguindo todas as exigências ambientais e de controle de qualidade, com certificação ISO 9001.

Em Junho de 2022 a Núcleo Ligas, visando expandir sua atuação e consolidando cada vez mais seu crescimento, irá dobrar sua capacidade produtiva, podendo alcançar até 1.920/toneladas produzidas por ano.

Contando com colaboradores capacitados, setor comercial especializado e uma estrutura produtiva ágil, estamos prontos para atendê-los e entregar a melhor solução em fornecimento de ferroligas e minérios para a sua empresa.

Name: Geo Spectra Pty Ltd
Description:
Geo Spectra is an Australian-based mineral exploration company that applies spectral remote sensing, advanced exploration data processing, and machine-learning geospatial data integration modelling in mineral exploration. We specialize primarily in cutting-edge mineral target generation for gold, copper, lithium, and iron.


At Geo Spectra, our use of Aster, World View 3, and Sentinel-2 multi-spectral and Prisma and En-Map hyperspectral satellite imagery data, combined with our deep understanding of mineral system concepts, allows us to map favorable hydrothermal alteration minerals and structures with unparalleled precision. The comprehensive view provided by our maps of color composite, alteration mineral type, alteration intensity, iron oxides intensity, Jarosite-clays intensity, and silica intensity sets a new standard for regional, district, and deposit scale exploration. 

TGE is managed by Dr. Hooshang Asadi Haroni, who is based in Australia, and Dr. Marc Goossens, who is based in the Netherlands. Dr. Asadi has 25 years of experience in spectral mineral remote sensing, geospatial data integration modeling, and several activities in various gold and copper exploration stages. These experiences, combined with his earlier experience working in Rio Tinto as an exploration geologist and remote sensing and GIS analyst, led him to discover several gold, copper, and other mineral deposits, mainly using spectral remote sensing in the first exploration stage. 
Marc Goossens has about 30 years of experience in spectral remote sensing, mainly managing the Geosense company. His primary expertise is spectral mapping of alteration patterns, mineral target generation, and field spectroscopy, where he carried out several projects for international companies such as Rio Tinto, BHP, Anglo-American, Newmont, Stratex, etc. He worked at Anglo-American and Newmont for several years. In early 2000, Marc found an opportunity

Name: DEMBA MINING
Description:
En 1972, l'arrivée de Monsieur DEMBA SY originaire du Mali à l'Est du Cameroun plus précisément à Batouri va amener une avancée significative dans le secteur minier. Étant inscrit et répertorié à la CAPAM, son expertise et son expérience l'ont rendu incontournable dans le domaine pendant plus d'un demi-siècle.

À travers toutes ses décennies, le fruit de la collaboration entre la CAPAM et Monsieur DEMBA SY a largement contribué à répertorier, quantifier et valoriser tout l'Est du Cameroun jusqu'à la frontière avec la RCA dans ce secteur d'activité.

Par la suite, l'un des fils DEMBA SY en la personne d'Amadou DEMBA SY reprend le flambeau. Pour parfaire à son expérience professionnelle, il entreprend d'acquérir et de développer ses compétences suite à différentes expériences.
De 2015-2018 : Exploitation d'une mine à Ouesso au Nord du Congo Brazzaville avec pour débauché l'analyse du sol, extraction de la roche ainsi que de la qualité de l'or du pays.

Il revient au Cameroun et dispose d'une vision un peu plus élargie avec une expérience et des compétences qu'il met toute de suite à profit.
De 2018-2019 : Exploitation d'une mine à BINDIMBA près de Garoua-Boulaï dans la région de l'Est Cameroun ;

Entre 2018-2021 : Exploitation d'une mine à BÉTARÉ-OYA à l'Est du Cameroun.

Name: The Discovery Files Podcast
Description:
What really makes a discovery?

This isn’t another podcast about the next big deposit or the person who “called it.” This is a journey into the human side of discovery—the stories behind the core sheds, drill pads, and field maps. We talk to the people who make exploration work: core loggers, drillers, project geologists, senior geos, and everyone in between.

Through honest, unfiltered conversations, we explore the emotions, lessons, failures, team dynamics, and quiet wins that rarely make it into the headlines. We ask: what does a truly successful exploration team look like? How much of discovery is science, and how much is intuition, collaboration, or even chaos?

If you’ve ever wondered whether our industry really understands what drives discovery—or if we’re missing the bigger picture—this podcast is for you.

Real people. Real stories. Real discovery.

Name: Sarn Helen Gold
Description:
Sarn Helen Gold was founded to explore and develop gold projects in Wales, UK.
Wales has a rich history of gold production and its gold has been used for wedding rings by numerous members of the royal family.
Despite this, activity in the country in recent years has been confined to small scale production from historic mines and little to know effort has been made to explore for new deposits.

Sarn Helen Gold are here to change that.

Our aim is to find a gold deposit and establish a gold mine. Our focus is Wales but we remain open to opportunities elsewhere. We are using up to date exploration techniques and are exploring in a manner that will have positive environmental and societal impacts.
To date we have collected and analysed over 8,000 rock, stream and rock samples and built an excellent knowledge base of our license areas.
We now look to use this knowledge to advance to our maiden drilling programme in 2026.

Name: RMM-Recovery Mining Metallurgy
Description:
RMM Madencilik, 2017 yılı itibariyle aktif olarak maden ihracatına başlamıştır. Özellikle Çinko Cevheri ihracatında önemli bir gelişme gerçekleştirmiş ve MART-2018 dönemi itibariyle, Kayseri Gümrük Müdürlüğü’nden en fazla karayolu ihracat çıkışı gerçekleştiren firma olmuştur.
2017 yılında toplam 2853 ton olan ihracat hacmi, 2018 yılının ilk dört ayında 54103 tona yükselmiştir. İhracat lojistiğinde, müşterilerinin talebi doğrultusunda karayolu – denizyolu ve demiryolu kullanabilme kabiliyetine de sahiptir. Kayseri Yeşilhisar’da bulunan tesislerinde, yükleme yapabilme ve aynı zamanda talep doğrultusunda malzemeyi paketleyebilme imkanı da mevcuttur.
2018 yılının ilk dört ayında, Yeşilhisar tesisinde 803 adet tır yüklemesi gerçekleştirilmiş ve yaklaşık 21000 ton malzeme bu sevkiyata uygun olarak paketlenmiştir.
Yine 2018 yılının ilk aylarında, Mersin Limanı’ndan 34000 tonluk dökme malzeme ihracatı gerçekleştirilmiş olup, yıl içerisinde tekrarlanması planlanmaktadır.
Akvo Şirketler Topluluğu bünyesinde bulunan laboratuvar sayesinde de, ticarete konu olan malzemelere ilişkin Çinko-Kurşun-Demir-Klor-Flor gibi elementlerin oranları, literatürde kabul görmüş yöntem ve cihazlar ile tespit edilebilmekte ve bununla beraber nem analizleri yapılabilmektedir.
Rmm Madencilik olarak 2017 yılında başladığımız Külçe Çinko ithalatı kapsamında %99.99 saflığa kadar Külçe Çinko ithalatı gerçekleştirmektedir. 


Külçe Çinko
 
Modern dünyanın en çok kullandığı metal hammaddelerden olan çinko, boya üretiminden otomotiv sanayine de pek çok alanda kullanılmaktadır. Kullanım miktarına göre sırasıyla demir, alüminyum ve bakırın ardından modern endüstrinin en fazla ihtiyaç duyduğu dördündü metal olan çinko bilhassa pirinç ve sıcak daldırma galvaniz sektörleri için alternatifsiz maddelerdendir. Ülkemizin en önemli çinko üreticilerinden olan MEB Metal, müşteri taleplerine göre her gün farklı alaşım oranlarında külçe çinko üretimi yapmaktadır.

Name: Multispectral Microscopic Technologies, S.L
Description:
MMT was founded with the aim of commercialising the AMCO system, an innovative technology for rapid microscopic characterisation of metallic ores, based on automated multispectral reflected-light optical microscopy.
The AMCO system was designed to be operated by the typical laboratory staff of an ore processing plant, making it affordable to small and medium-sized mines. Regular use of the AMCO system to characterise the feed and the different product streams of a processing plant allows the plant's operating parameters to be adapted to the natural variations of the ore, maximising metal recovery and concentrate grade while minimising energy and water consumption. This optimises the performance of the mining activity within the circular economy and helps to reduce any harmful effects that may arise from plant effluents.

Name: North America Critical Elements Corporation (NACE Corp.)
Description:
North America Critical Elements Corporation (NACE Corp) is a pioneering U.S.-based statup dedicated to securing America's critical minerals supply chain through the America Mineral Independence Initiative (AMI-Initiative). Founded by Fabrice Demtare (Interim CEO) and Carl T. Delfeld (President), NACE Corp addresses the nation's vulnerability to China’s 80% dominance in critical minerals like lithium, rare earths, cobalt, and many others. 

Our mission is to reduce significantly foreign dependence by 2040, fostering U.S. national security, economic prosperity, and global leadership.

Structured around five specialized subsidiaries:

NACE-Exploration: Building a 200+ world-class mining project portfolio via the Critical Mineral Exploration Center (CMEC) in Golden, CO.

NACE-Mining: Extracting 10M tons of concentrates annually through direct/indirect operations, with the Mining Machine Yard (MMY) in Orlando, FL.

NACE-Refining: Producing 2M tons of refined minerals yearly at the Multi-Element Refining Complex (MERC) on the Gulf Coast, TX.

NACE-Reserve: Managing a 10M-ton Private Strategic Reserve (PSR) across sites in TX, OH, AZ, NV.

NACE-Capital: Raising a $50B strategic fund to finance the ecosystem.

Aligne with America First, the AMI-Initiative will create 15,000 direct jobs (12,500 U.S.) and 20,000 indirect/induced by 2040, with ESG excellence: zero liquid discharge, and $100M annual community investments. 

Join us to power a sovereign, resilient America.

Follow for updates on critical minerals, mining innovation, and U.S. mineral sovereignty. #AMInitiative #CriticalMinerals #AmericaFirst

Name: ExSorbtion Inc.
Description:
ExSorbtion’s mission is to become the highest-value supplier of lithium to enable electrification of everything.

ExSorbtion has acquired and is commercializing a technology developed by SRI International. This technology portfolio includes patented sorbents that have demonstrated very high lithium selectivity, fast reaction time to adsorb lithium from the brine and to remove lithium from the sorbent.

The patented regeneration process uses carbon dioxide gas instead of acid (which is used by all other DLE companies) to extract the adsorbed lithium from the sorbents. By using gas instead of acid, ExSorbtion’s sorbents last >10x longer than competing manganese- and titanium-based sorbents – which is important since cost of the sorbent is >30% of the overall cost of goods sold for the DLE process, enabling potentially the lowest operating cost compared to other DLE process.

Additionally, since the process uses carbon dioxide gas for regeneration, the process basically acts as a carbon sink making it the greenest DLE process, while consuming significantly lower amount water for each ton of lithium carbonate produced which is >60% lower than competing DLE processes.

2012 yılında Denizli’de kurulan Denmet Metal Sanayi A.Ş., 2200 m² kapalı alana sahip tesisinde, Metal İşleme ve Karoser imalatı alanında uzmanlaşmıştır. Müşteri memnuniyetini en ön planda tutan Denmet Metal, en son teknolojiyle donatılmış makineler, alanında uzman personeli ve zamanında teslim ettiği projelerle sektörde güvenle anılmaktadır.

CNC teknolojisine sahip OXY Plazma Tezgahı, Abkant Büküm Makinaları, Giyotin Makaslar, Boru Profil Kıvırma makineleri ve 320 tonluk presi ile 0.5 mm’den 200 mm’ye kadar metal işleme kapasitesine sahiptir. Çelik konstrüksiyon projeleri, statik analiz, imalat çizimi ve metraj hizmetleriyle de müşterilerimize kapsamlı çözümler sunmaktadır.

2013 yılından itibaren karoser imalatında, hafif ve ağır ticari araçlar için kapalı, açık, polyester, kayar perde ve frigorifik kasa çeşitleri üreterek bu alanda da faaliyet göstermektedir.

Denmet Metal olarak, bölgesindeki güçlü konumunu yeni açılımlar ve katma değerli ürünlerle daha da pekiştirmekteyiz. Güncel teknolojiyi yakından takip eden, kaliteden ödün vermeyen, çevreye ve insana duyarlı yaklaşımımızla, sektördeki büyüme ve gelişimimizi kararlılıkla sürdürmekteyiz.

Name: Bhanja Minerals & Metals
Description:
Bhanja Minerals & Metals founded in 1927, is a Privately owned enterprise  having a global presence in 43 countries.
It is a full time member of International Miners Association and  Schedule-B company.

It is a Category II company since June 2019 and ISO 9001 certified since March 1998 and ISO 27001 since 2021 certification for its information security management.

In 1965, Bhanja Minerals & Metals started it's first indigenous testing lab in India and till date has successfully tested and assisted several entities globally for mineral testing.

In 1978, Bhanja Minerals & Metals was originally conceived and proposed by a joint study group with Polish and Australian experts as a comprehensive planning set-up under one roof for entire Indian mining industry, which was then operating on a rudimentary planning system. This was also the time when Indian mining-industry was being nationalized to enable it to support the high growth of energy sector required for speedy industrial growth of the country in the coming years.

In December 1981, we setup first Manganese open pit at India.

In January 1994, Bhanja Minerals & Metals started functioning with Ministry of Mines, India and Ministry of mines, Australia as joint venture.

On 1st November 2001, Bhanja Minerals & Metals became one of the few entities in the world with 93 running mines as open pit.

23 August 2012, Bhanja Minerals & Metals signed 13 PPP projects with various African countries, becoming indigenous of its kind.

On 4th July 2022, Bhanja Minerals & Metals joined as a permanent member of World Health Organization for the direct facilities of mine workers in Africa.

Name: Norfolk Metals Ltd
Description:
On June 13th 2025 Norfolk Metals Ltd (Norfolk) commenced the earn in on the Carmen Copper Project (Project) in Chile. This earn in will see Norfolk earn up to 70% of the Project option via A$3m expenditure within 3 years with the option to go to 100% of the Project option via the issue of 8.075m shares to the Operational Team / Option Vendors; Transcendence Mining Pty Ltd (TM).

TM is led by Jason Greive and David Fowler (please see Management Tab). Together, the board of NFL and the team at TM share the vision to establish the Carmen Copper Project as a low-cost, high-margin, value-accretive copper heap leaching operation producing copper cathode at the mine gate. 

The Project is located in the Huasco Province, Atacama Region in Chile. The Project encompasses twenty-two contiguous exploration and exploitation licenses totalling 46.6km2.

There are multiple mineralised targets over an extensive strike length with intensive copper mineralisation from surface across two distinct belts. 

Only 16km to the northeast of the Project is the Nueva Unión joint venture between Teck and Newmont. Nueva Unión is currently developing the multi-billion-dollar Relincho and Fortuna deposits.

Whilst the Project currently presents as a copper oxide project with highly soluble copper oxide mineralisation from surface; it also hosts significant sulphide potential as demonstrated in historical drill intercepts that will be further explored in the Maiden Drill Campaign in Q3 2025.

Name: Tome y Traiga, Detectores de Metales
Description:
En Detectores de Metales Tome y Traiga somos aficionados y expertos, contamos con equipo calificado, pero por sobre todo, somos amantes de esta hermosa actividad que nos apasiona.

Todo comenzó como un hobby, y pronto nos dimos cuenta de que perseguir cada señal en busca de tesoros no solo es emocionante, sino que tiene algo de mágico. No siempre se trata de oro o monedas antiguas. Es la exploración de lugares desconocidos, inhóspitos, descubriendo los secretos que guarda la tierra y que nosotros, en nuestro afán de cruzar límites, debemos descubrir. Es la versión material de un momento y un lugar, un recuerdo, una historia que guardamos para siempre.

Es la paciencia del cazador y el olfato del experto; es la inquietud por investigar lo desconocido y la emoción del hallazgo localizado por el detector de metales. ¿Acaso tú conoces todos los secretos que están bajo el suelo? ¿Alguna vez te has topado con un meteorito o una pepita de oro en su estado natural? ¿Ha estado en algún lugar donde se ha librado una batalla histórica y deseas encontrar un testimonio de semejante acontecimiento? ¿O ha desenterrado una reliquia cargada de historia… que ha estado aguardando todos estos años de que la descubras? Todos los objetos tienen un destino, y quizás el tuyo sea hallarlos y hacerlos tuyos o compartirlos, donarlos a un museo, etc.

En nuestra actividad ponemos toda la carne en el asador!, y es por ello que fuimos reconocido y valorados por las principales marcas como distribuidores oficiales autorizado de los detector de metales MINELAB, NOKTA MAKRO, GARRETT, QUEST y XP, y más. Son las mejores marcas de Detectores de Metales del mundo. Porque queremos que tu te entusiasmes tanto como nosotros con esta actividad y contagiar nuestra pasión, por lo cual nuestra oferta de detector de metales es menos una actividad comercial y más una tarea de promoción de un hobby apasionante.

Tenemos presencia en Uruguay, Argentina, Brasil, Bolivia y Perú.

Its the best place to join Carl and discuss your geological consulting needs. Carl has over thirty years industry experience and has particular expertise, at all scales, in orogenic gold, lithium, magmatic nickel, porphyry copper, VHMS and sediment-hosted Pb-Zn mineral systems. Particular experiences are listed in Carl's resumé, and include many orogenic gold deposits and districts, particularly in the Yilgarn, a number of magmatic nickel sulphide districts in the Yilgarn, lithium-pegmatite fields in the Pilbara and Yilgarn Cratons, Anaconda-style mapping and core logging at the Jebel Ohier porphyry copper deposit in Sudan, various VHMS districts including regional alteration mapping of the Panorama VHMS camp in the Pilbara and long-term geochemical and fieldwork consulting on the DeGrussa Project for Sandfire Resources, and basin-hosted Pb-Zn systems in the Kimberley.

Name: Fluoromet
Description:
Fluoromet Ltd is redefining how critical minerals and rare earth elements are refined and revalued in Australia.

Based on the NSW Central Coast, Fluoromet is pioneering next-generation refining technologies that transform ores, concentrates, and even mining waste into premium-grade products — achieving high recoveries, ultra-low emissions, and near-zero waste. Our process enables sequential extraction of multiple elements, turning tailings into new sources of strategic value.

Fluoromet is helping close Australia’s mid-stream gap — the missing link between raw resource and refined product. Instead of exporting concentrates offshore, our modular refining platform enables domestic production of lithium, rare earths, alumina, silica, tantalum and other high-value materials, strengthening supply chains and national capability.

To take this technology to industry, Fluoromet established Liberate Minerals, its commercialisation partner with an exclusive global licence to deploy the Resource Maximisation Process (RMP). Fluoromet leads scientific development and pilot engineering, while Liberate builds the commercial pathways and modular mid-stream hubs for deployment across Australia and future global markets.

Our multidisciplinary team continues to advance the RMP from lab validation toward pilot-scale operations, proving that sustainable refining can also be commercially superior — unlocking value, creating regional jobs, and supporting sovereign resilience across the resource sector.

Fluoromet and Liberate Minerals are shaping a future where Australia doesn’t just mine the materials of tomorrow, but refines and defines them.

Mining studies are underway to evaluate how best way to extract value from this significant asset.

Name: Mailchimp Multi-Purpose (U) SMC- Ltd
Description:
Mining is the lifeblood of our existence. The industry powers every single facet of our daily lives: The bridges we cross, the planes we fly in, the electricity we use and the technology we’re addicted to. Even the plates on our table and the cosmetics on our faces come from mines, and if you own an electric vehicle, then you likely know, they wouldn’t exist if not for the critical metals found in the ground.

With the increasing demand for metals, especially those critical to the development of some of our newest technologies, mining has become an attractive sector for investors seeking growth and diversification.

The mining industry is made up of two groups: Majors and juniors.

Junior exploration companies are higher risk but higher reward. They are companies in search of new discoveries and mineral deposits. If juniors are successful, they can return morestock value in a few days than majors will return in years. For this reason, juniors are considered growth stocks, and I believe investors looking for portfolio growth should keep an eye on this group.

Given the increasing demand for critical metals and the need for a supply—especially to develop products like EV batteries—juniors are entering a period of deep importance.

According to Benchmark Minerals, to avoid critical mineral shortages, the world will require well over 330 new mines (paywall) over the next decade.

To understand juniors, it’s useful to view them as equivalent to tech startups. They are the pioneers of the industry. Of course, the big difference between a tech startup and a junior is that juniors are working to find resources critical to our survival, whereas tech startups are looking to bring something innovative to the market.

Mining is one of the best investments and can offer very lucrative Opportunities, Returns on Investment(ROI) and benefits even in times of uncertainty or economic downturn as a scalable sustainable business model.

شرکت طلاوران پارس فرآور ارائه دهندهی خدمات نوین و روزآمد در حوزهی فرآوری مواد معدنی با تکیه بر دانش روز دنیا و با همکاری اساتید و فارغالتحصیلان متخصص و مجرب در رشتهی فرآوری مواد معدنی در صدد است تا به شیوهای نو خدمات مطالعات و اجرای پروژههای فرآوری مواد و استحصال فلزات را به جامعهی معدنی کشور ارائه نماید.

خدمات ما
تخصص اصلی ما شناسایی، خواصسنجی و فرآوری انواع کانسنگهای طلادار است که شامل مطالعات امکانسنجی، مطالعات آزمایشگاهی و پایلوت، تجزیه و تحلیل نتایج و در نهایت طراحی و ساخت کارخانههای فرآوری طلا است. علاوهبراین با تکیه بر دانش فنی کسب شده و بهره بردن از افراد کارآزموده و فعال در زمینههای مختلف فرآوری مواد معدنی، توانستهایم در سه سال گذشته و پس از تاسیس شرکت، پروژههای متعددی در ارتباط با سایر مواد معدنی فلزی و غیرفلزی به ثمر برسانیم. پروژههای این شرکت بر حسب نوع کانسنگ و مقیاس مطالعات، توسط برجستهترین متخصصان و تیم پیمانکاری ساخت، نصب و راهاندازی شرکت که به صورت قراردادی با مجموعه طلاوران همکاری دارند، انجام میشوند. شروع هر پروژه، شروع شکلگیری یک تیم تخصصی برای انجام آن پروژه است، تیمی که در پروژههای قبلی این شرکت همکاری کردهاند و هماهنگی دارند.

Name: Horizon Europe ENICON
Description: The cobalt (Co) and nickel (Ni) demand is expected to be about 20 times higher in 2040 than in 2020. Given that Europe plays only a minor role in the global Ni/Co supply chains, which are concentrated in the DRC, Indonesia and China, we face a serious problem in securing a reliable, affordable and sustainable supply of battery-grade Ni/Co, vital for Europe’s aims to be climate-neutral by 2050. In view of a “domestic and foreign sourcing” procurement model, ENICON exploits the potential of (low-grade) Ni/Co resources within Europe – i.e. sulphidic Ni/Co ores and derived Ni/Co-bearing pyrite and silicate tailings, and limonitic/saprolitic laterite Ni(/Co) ores – while improving and developing the Ni/Co-refining capacity that can process imported ores, concentrates and intermediates. ENICON comprises both major improvements to existing Ni/Co metallurgical unit operations in Europe as well as the development of a new HCl-based route for both Ni/Co sulphide concentrates and laterites. ENICON’s HCl-route dispenses with the old-school hydro-approach of continuously precipitating and redissolving metals that requires lots of chemicals and creates problematic waste streams. The HCl-based route can be extended to the downstream processing of FeNi (Class-II Ni) obtained from laterites; (2) Mixed (Ni/Co) Sulphide/Hydroxide Precipitate (MSP/MHP) from the bioleaching of Co-rich pyrite tailings; and Ni/Co-containing silicate tailings. ENICON targets a “forensic geometallurgy” protocol, making it possible to identify and mitigate the mineralogical and textural reasons for processing losses along existing and new flowsheets. To make the transition to (near) zero-waste processing and to further reduce CO2-footprints, ENICON develops enhanced mineral-matrix valorisation processes. The outputs from ENICON’s group of European Ni/Co mining, processing and refining companies will all be benchmarked in terms of positive environmental and techno-economic impacts against current methods.

Name: Stavian Industrial Metal
Description:
Stavian Industrial Metal Joint Stock Company was established on June 18, 2021, with new directions and the desire to conquer new peaks, to build a vibrant – transparent industrial metal materials market, towards the goal of sustainable development.

The strong capabilities of shareholders, strong financial foundation and professional sales solutions customized specifically for each customer have created a distinct advantage and solid foundation for Stavian Industrial Metal.

The system of offices and warehouses in Hanoi, Hai Phong, and Ho Chi Minh City along with a strong domestic distribution network, reputable partners in more than 100 countries and 30 branches around the world help Stavian Industrial Metal become a leading trading company, with the ability to quickly provide all products to domestic customers and promote exports to international markets. Therefore, Stavian Industrial Metal is increasingly receiving the trust of major partners in the industry, gradually affirming its position as a large-scale industrial metal materials trading company, not only serving the ecosystem of the group, but also having full capacity to supply materials for large-scale projects inside and outside the country, bringing Vietnam's building material products to the world.

Stavian Industrial Metal sets the goal by 2028 to become one of the Top 10 largest industrial metal materials trading companies in Southeast Asia.

Name: The Metal Guys Talk Business
Description: Peter Comerford and Michael Bolton have worked in the metal sector for over 10 years, a huge global industry that produces more than a billion tonnes of material annually and affects all other industries and walks of life. They now run a successful recruitment and marketing company servicing the metal and engineering sectors, making them ideally placed to provide impartial, independent insight into the industry, sitting outside the hierarchy of the various stages of industry from raw material to finished product. In this podcast, they talk to the industry players that manufacture and distribute metal products, as well as the engineering and fabrication companies that use them. If you produce, work with or supply metal, then tune in and join the conversation.

Through our Family of Companies network, we offer a full line of more than 100,000 metal products. We are able to deliver orders just-in-time – often within 24 hours of receipt. Each Anton employee is able to provide excellent service to customers, who are also fellow community members and neighbors. Quick turnaround, high quality, and other services save time, labor, and expense for our customers – over 90% of whom return to do business with us – and reduce overall manufacturing costs while increasing profitability across many industries.
Contact us, if have any metal requirements.

Name: International Platinum Group Metals Association (IPA)
Description:
International Platinum Group Metals Association e.V. is a not for profit association that represents the worldwide leading mining, production and fabrication companies in the global platinum group metals (PGMs) industry, comprising platinum, palladium, iridium, rhodium, osmium, and ruthenium. The organisation, founded in 1987, is based in Munich. The major aim of the organisation acts as a platform for discussion and information exchange between its members and with our stakeholders. Furthermore, the IPA serves as an early warning system for the PGM industry by monitoring legislation (emissions control, REACH, CRM, recycling, EHS etc.) and industry related topics such as trade, health & safety, and sustainable development.
The association actively engages and collaborates in a strong network of partner organisations.
The IPA aims to foster the understanding of the benefits of PGMs, especially in the context of clean energy transition, to engage in discussions around sustainability, responsible mining and sourcing, and to generate and offer data on the life cycle of our metals.
